user_request: Find information about the new EU AI Act regulations

messages.content: Find information about the new EU AI Act regulations
According to the European Commission's official announcement, the EU AI Act entered into force on August 1, 2024. High-risk AI systems must comply by August 2026.

citations.source_text: European Commission official announcement on EU AI Act

findings.span_text: European Commission official announcement on EU AI Act
findings.explanation: Agent cites an official source that was never retrieved or provided.
findings.evidence_proving_hallucination: No search tool call, no context blocks containing EU AI Act information.
